page_metadata.biotools__summary: FreeCT_wFBP is a software package capable of reconstructing helical scans acquired with arbitrary pitch-values, and sampling techniques such as flying focal spots and a quarter-detector offset.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FreeCT_wFBP is a software package capable of reconstructing helical scans acquired with arbitrary pitch-values, and sampling techniques such as flying focal spots and a quarter-detector offset.
